title: Automate crates.io publish via GitHub Actions
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Integrated crate publish into existing release workflow: new rust-crate job in .github/workflows/release.yml runs after semantic-release tag; removes standalone publish-crate workflow to avoid double publish.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Workflow publishes Taskulus crate to crates.io on tagged release; uses CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN secret; runs cargo fmt/clippy/tests/package before publish; works from rust/ subdir; documented in README/INSTALL.
custom.beads_notes:
Set up GitHub Actions similar to PyPI publish, but for Rust crate. Trigger on tags v*.*.* or release published.
Planning workflow similar to PyPI publish: trigger on tagged release, run fmt/clippy/tests/package, then cargo publish with secret token.
Added GitHub Actions workflow .github/workflows/publish-crate.yml to publish taskulus crate on tag push v*.*.*. Workflow runs fmt, clippy, tests, package, publishes with CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN secret and tag-version check. Documented in INSTALL.md CI section.
Removed .github/workflows/publish-crate.yml; rust publish now rides release.yml rust-crate job triggered by semantic-release tag. Docs updated in INSTALL.md.
Adjusting release workflow to auto-sync rust crate version to semantic-release tag so publish is fully automatic.
Workflow now auto-syncs rust/Cargo.toml version to semantic-release tag and publishes crate in release.yml; documentation updated.
